title: Hackathon Crash Course
description: A practical introduction to hackathons, covering teamwork, problem-solving, pitching, and the essential tools needed to succeed in competitive innovation events.

title: FrontEndForAll
description: Learn the fundamentals of UI/UX design and frontend development, from wireframing and prototyping to creating engaging user experiences with modern design tools.

title: Backend 101
description: Discover the core concepts of backend development, including APIs, databases, server-side logic, and how these components work together to power real-world applications.

title: Leveraging AI
description: Learn how to effectively integrate AI tools and technologies into your hackathon projects to build smarter, faster, and more impactful solutions.

title: UI/UX Deep Dive
description: Gain a deeper understanding of UI/UX design, from user research and wireframing to creating seamless and impactful user experiences.

title: Web Scraping 101
description: Learn the fundamentals of web scraping and data extraction, including how to collect, process, and utilize online data efficiently using modern tools and techniques.
